265 H2D H2D_FECAL_IMPACT (H2D) Fecal Impaction CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: bowel elimination pattern - fecal impaction. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
266 H2E H2E_NONE_ABOVE (H2E) None of Above Bowel Elimination Pattern CHAR 1 Continence in last 14 days: bowel elimination pattern - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
